Pricing

Transparent retainers with performance accountability

Plans scale by clinic count and channel complexity with clear implementation scope.

PlanIdeal ForMonthly FeePrimary Deliverables
Core3-5 clinics$6,500SEO baseline, paid search management, monthly roadmap
Growth6-12 clinics$11,000Full-funnel optimization, CRO sprint, attribution layer
Enterprise13+ clinicsCustomMulti-region strategy, advanced forecasting, executive reporting
